description_long: This object consists of a small stack of four hardcover books arranged on a rectangular wooden base. The books vary in size and color, with covers in blue, green, and two shades of red. The two largest books are standing upright at the back, while the two smaller books are stacked horizontally in front. The covers are plain, with no visible illustrations or text, and the spines are simple and unadorned. The wooden base is flat and has a natural brown finish, providing a stable support for the books. The overall appearance is clean and organized, suitable for display in a public or private urban setting.
description: A group of four plain hardcover books in blue, green, and red, neatly arranged on a brown wooden base. The books are stacked and upright, with no visible cover illustrations or text.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four books, with two upright at the back and two stacked horizontally in front on a wooden base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the upright books and the horizontal arrangement of the two front books.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back cover of the largest blue book, with the wooden base visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upright blue and green books and the stacked red books from the other side.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain and solid-colored, matching the covers in blue, green, and red, with no visible text or decorative elements.
